public_requirements.disclosed_boundary: Every material claim records an evidence ID, scope, authority, and caveat.
Separate measurement consistency from individual professional validity and reconcile both.
Treat the seven-run execution ablation as directional and specify a controlled pilot.
Give a recommendation, decision threshold, experiment, and stop condition.

private_consequence_checks.held_out_boundary: The memo must not use E01-E04 as proof of professional validity without addressing E05-E06 and E10.
Any adoption claim based on E07-E09 must preserve sample size, configured-system scope, and confounds.
Every material number in the memo maps to a valid evidence_id row with compatible scope.
The experiment and stop condition could change the stated decision rather than merely endorse it.

aggregation_warning: Weights are unvalidated design hypotheses. Keep check results separate until expert review and pilot calibration justify any aggregate.
